title: astelia fragrans
intro: Astelia fragrans, also known as the 'Mountain Silversword', is a rare and unique plant native to New Zealand, characterized by its striking silver-green foliage. The plant has been traditionally used in Maori medicine, where its leaves have been applied to wounds and used to treat skin conditions and infections due to their antimicrobial properties. The leaves of the Astelia fragrans plant have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues, including wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Astelia fragrans include teas, salves, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
